person.name: MD Mahmudun Nur Miraz
person.summary: Final-year Computer Science student with interest and experience in AI/ML research and full-stack software development.
person.about: Final-year Computer Science student with hands-on experience in AI/ML research and full-stack application development. Strong foundation in Python, PyTorch, and modern React-based frontend development. Experienced in building experimental ML pipelines, reasoning-oriented LLM workflows, and REST-style backend systems. Interested in applied AI, reasoning systems, and scalable software development across the full Machine Learning SDLC

whatIDo.title: Software Development
whatIDo.description: Building full-stack applications with modern frameworks. From REST APIs to responsive frontends, I enjoy creating complete solutions that solve real problems.

whatIDo.title: AI/ML Research
whatIDo.description: Exploring reasoning systems and language model distillation. Currently working on Tree-of-Thought approaches for making smaller models smarter.

whatIDo.title: Continuous Learning
whatIDo.description: Always experimenting with new technologies and methodologies. From PyTorch pipelines to React patterns, I'm constantly expanding my technical toolkit.

research.title: Tree-of-Thought Distillation for Small Language Models
points: Generating reasoning traces using branching and pruning
Fine-tuning and evaluation for small language models

projects.title: QuickHire — Job Board Platform
points: Full-stack job board for browsing and applying to jobs
Search and filter jobs by title, company, category, and location
Admin dashboard to manage job listings and applications
RESTful API with Express and MongoDB for backend data management

points: Product listing and trending section UI
